proposal_allowed_reason: A zero-to-first-shell decrease is only a necessary Stieltjes check. The current packet has two q_hat^2 levels, no pole/model-class rows, no spectral threshold theorem, no multivolume FV/IR limit, and no canonical O_H or W/Z bridge.

does not treat a first-shell Stieltjes check as scalar-LSZ authority

does not set kappa_s, c2, or Z_match to one
